claim_scope: Independent audit of the frozen Springer seed, all 407253 radius-two pairs, and direct derivation of its 43-variable distance-six constraint system; completeness of the 86-word optimum set is certified separately.

independence.constraints: all C(43,5) five-sets rederived without retained fixed-edge tests
independence.parser: line-oriented ASCII token parser written for this audit
independence.radius_two: C++20 adjacency bitsets; each K5 is counted from its three smallest vertices and an edge in their common neighborhood

one_orbit_constraints.completeness_dependency: separate deterministic CNF plus checked proof log

radius_two.strict_predicate: for every v in {6,12,36,42}, at least one edited edge is not incident to v
